g.text: Trace: "Person on Floor 3 presses UP. Scheduler picks nearest elevator. Elevator moves to Floor 3, opens door, person presses Floor 7 inside."
"A Building has N Floors. Each Floor has
Person on Floor 3 presses UP button.
That triggers the external request flow."
1. Prefer elevator going same direction AND
hasn't passed the floor (e.g., Elev 1 at
controlElevator() waits on CV when idle,
3. Move floor by floor to destination
across all elevators use the same dispatcher.
Single point of contact for internal requests."
External: 'I need AN elevator at Floor 3'
or LeastBusy) to pick best elevator -> ElevatorController receives
request in thread-safe priority queue -> Controller's thread wakes
up, processes SCAN algorithm (min-heap UP, max-heap DOWN) ->
ElevatorCar moves to Floor 3, opens Door -> Person enters, presses
same Controller enqueues Floor 7 -> car moves to Floor 7."
Building has Floors, each Floor has UP/DOWN ExternalButtons
Scheduler picks best elevator: Nearest or LeastBusy
Inside elevator: InternalButton -> Singleton Dispatcher -> Controller
